InstructionData.Title: Generator Automation v001
InstructionData.Description: Generator Automation and Power levels monitor. Reads all batteries on network and shows charge levels on LED Displays. Also turns solid fuel generator on and off as needed. ​
InstructionData.Author: AJ
InstructionData.Instructions:
j init # run one-time initialisations
main: lb rChargeTotal StationBattHash Charge Sum div rChargeRatio rChargeTotal rSystemMaxCharge s self Setting rChargeRatio s dConsole1 Setting rChargeRatio s dConsole2 Setting rChargeTotal bgtal rChargeTotal rUpThreshold DisableGenerator bltal rChargeTotal rLrThreshold EnableGenerator j main
EnableGenerator: s dGenerator On 1 j ra DisableGenerator: s dGenerator On 0 j ra
EoF: j main # Loop program, just in case
init: # Pins alias self db alias dConsole1 d2 alias dConsole2 d3 alias dGenerator d1 # Registers alias rCount r0 alias rLrThreshold r1 alias rUpThreshold r2 alias rBattCount r3 alias rChargeTotal r4 alias rBattMaxCharge r5 alias rSystemMaxCharge r6 alias rChargeRatio r7 # Constants define StationBattHash -400115994 # Initialise Variables
# Do some cold-boot logic lb rBattCount StationBattHash Power Sum lb rSystemMaxCharge StationBattHash Maximum Sum div rBattMaxCharge rSystemMaxCharge rBattCount mul rLrThreshold rSystemMaxCharge 0.2 mul rUpThreshold rSystemMaxCharge 0.8 s dConsole1 Mode 1 s dConsole2 Mode 2 j main
